name: Southern Fried Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup whole milk or evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the milk and water.
2. Cut the chicken into pieces and dip in the liquid mixture.
3. Place the dry ingredients, including flour, in a paper bag.
4. Heat the oil to nearly smoking temperature.
5. Remove the chicken from the liquid mixture, coating it with the flour mix one at a time.
6. Shake off excess flour on each piece.
7. Place the coated chicken into the skillet and fry until browned on both sides, covering tightly.
8. Lower the heat and continue cooking for 40 minutes, uncovered.
9. Increase the heat to crisp the chicken, turning once every few minutes for an additional 5-10 minutes.
